blended.narrative: Mt. Baker is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,612 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 16.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 16" over the past week. Current depth: 54".
